summary: Tested inventory refactor - All features working correctly. /inventory redirects to /inventory-manager, ProductConfig 'Ir a Inventario Maestro' link points to /inventory-manager?tab=recipes, InventoryManager page loads with all 7 tabs, Settings links point to /inventory-manager, no old Inventory.js exists.
passed_tests: InventoryManager page loads with 'INVENTARIO MAESTRO' title
InventoryManager has all 7 tabs: Insumos, Producción, Almacenes, Proveedores, Recetas, Stock, Compras
ProductConfig page Receta tab has 'Ir a Inventario Maestro' link pointing to /inventory-manager?tab=recipes
Settings > Inventario > Compras has 'Abrir Compras' button pointing to /inventory-manager?tab=purchases
Settings > Inventario > Stock has 'Abrir Inventario' button pointing to /inventory-manager
No old Inventory.js file exists - only InventoryManager.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory refactor completed successfully. Old inventory system removed. All routes now use /inventory-manager as the unified inventory solution. The redirect from /inventory to /inventory-manager works correctly. All Settings and ProductConfig links point to /inventory-manager.

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
